name: hud_sensor_tracker_load_objectives_from_path
description: HudSensorTracker::LoadObjectivesFromPath loads a mission objective ZRD tree, initializes mission image resources, applies READ_TIME/REVIEW_DELAY/FINAL_MISSION values, and handles the network skip path.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?LoadObjectivesFromPath@HudSensorTracker@@QAEHPBD@Z at 0x417f90 still fails: 585 unmasked mismatches, 144 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 666 bytes, VC object symbol size 768 bytes.

Reviewed difference is broad control-flow and register-allocation drift in this large parser function; the current source preserves the BN-observed source/ABI contract and the smoke exercises archive-backed zReader loading, timing fields, final mission handling, objective count reset, and the network-enabled early return.
Binary Ninja reconstruction remains limited by documented value-union rendering, objective-slot offset rendering, and the fake inherited x87 return on zImage::TexDirFindOrCreateByPath.
